sql.query: SELECT CASE ev.accounttype WHEN 'R' THEN '1. Revenue' WHEN 'E' THEN '2. Expenses' END AS category, ev.value || ' - ' || ev.name AS account, CASE ev.accounttype WHEN 'R' THEN SUM(fa.amtacctcr) - SUM(fa.amtacctdr) ELSE SUM(fa.amtacctdr) - SUM(fa.amtacctcr) END AS amount FROM fact_acct fa JOIN c_elementvalue ev ON ev.c_elementvalue_id = fa.account_id WHERE fa.ad_client_id IN ('__CLIENT_ID__') AND ev.accounttype IN ('R', 'E') AND ev.issummary = 'N' AND ('__DATEFROM__' = '' OR fa.dateacct >= '__DATEFROM__'::date) AND ('__DATETO__' = '' OR fa.dateacct <= '__DATETO__'::date) GROUP BY ev.accounttype, ev.value, ev.name HAVING ABS(SUM(fa.amtacctdr) - SUM(fa.amtacctcr)) > 0.01 ORDER BY category, ev.value
